keyTargets: Execute Hypertrophy B session with specific load adjustments and RIR/RPE targets.
Carefully monitor body's response to new Chest-supported Row and Soleus Wall-Sit for any SI discomfort, dropping immediately if pain occurs.
Adhere strictly to the 40-minute session time cap, prioritizing core exercises over optional chest flye if time runs short.
warnings: Accutane protocol: Remain vigilant for prolonged muscle pain (>72h), dark urine, persistent unilateral weakness, or calf cramping. If any occur, cease training, get CK lab draw, and contact dermatologist.
SI joint: Monitor closely for any discomfort during the new Chest-supported Row and Soleus Wall-Sit. If SI pain occurs, stop the exercise immediately.
highlights: Max HR field test on rower (W3 Fri 5/8) confirmed peak HR at 191 bpm.
LT1 verified on Sat 5/9 long Z1 row with excellent aerobic efficiency (3.3% decoupling).
Rowing-specific Z1 HR cap has been adjusted to ≤158 bpm based on LT1 verification.
Currently 3 consecutive days SI symptom-free (5/6, 5/7, 5/8) towards Phase B reintroduction.

exercises.name: Lat Pulldown (Neutral Grip)
exercises.note: Set 1: 125 lbs. Sets 2-3: Drift up to 130 lbs. Set 4: Back off to 120 lbs. Target RPE 8, last set to RIR 1.

exercises.name: Chest-supported Row
exercises.note: NEW exercise. 3 sets of 10 reps @ 80 lbs. Target RPE 8. Monitor SI closely.

exercises.name: Cable Lateral Raise
exercises.note: 3 sets @ 5 lbs/side uni. Target RPE 9 (last session: 5/side uni RPE 9).

exercises.name: Preacher Curl Machine
exercises.note: 3 sets of 12 reps @ 50 lbs/arm. Target RPE 8 (last session: 50x12 RIR 2).

exercises.name: Triceps Pushdown
exercises.note: Hold 42.5 lbs for all 3 sets until clean RIR 2 across all sets. Do not advance (last session: failed at 50, held 42.5).

exercises.name: Hanging Knee Raise
exercises.note: 3 sets of 10 reps @ BW. Target RPE 8.

exercises.name: Seated Calf Raise
exercises.note: 4 sets of 12-15 reps @ 315 lbs, maintaining RIR 2.

exercises.name: Soleus Wall-Sit Isometric
exercises.note: NEW exercise. 3 sets of 30–45 seconds @ BW. Knees ~80°, push through forefoot. Target RPE 7-8. Monitor SI closely.

exercises.name: Optional DB Flye or Pec Deck
exercises.note: Optional: 2 sets of 12 reps @ RPE 7, ONLY IF time allows and total lift stays within 40-minute cap. Prioritize dropping this if running long.

currentLoads.name: Incline BB
currentLoads.note: Last verified W3 Wed (125x8 RIR 2); AMRAP at 4-wk gates to re-set TM

currentLoads.name: Lat Pulldown
currentLoads.note: Anchor S1; drift to 130 S2-3, back off S4 to 120

currentLoads.name: Chest-supported Row
currentLoads.note: NEW to Sat circuit Phase B+; hold 80

currentLoads.name: Triceps Pushdown
currentLoads.note: W3 Wed (failed at 50); hold 42.5 until clean RIR 2 across all sets
